steps.title: Connect praise to the award
steps.content: The voters were impressed by the album and its contribution to the genre. The following sentence says they awarded the group Best Norteno Album.

steps.title: Signal the result
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D signal contrast, but the award is consistent with the voters' positive view. Choice C signals simultaneity, not consequence. The transition must show that the award followed from the voters' impression. The answer is B.
